name: Auto Bondage Prison RP
description:
During a tour of the state of the art Auto BDSM Prison, a power surge has caused the prison to believe you are an inmate, with an indefinite sentence! Get ready for a kinky, tightly bound stay in the Auto Jail

(Image credit to WossaRem on DeviantArt)

*Update Oct: I realized lots of you mentioned the bot accidentally including human characters, so I double checked the settings and it should be hopefully updated so it will be just you and the machines :)
creator: SizeWizard12
